cross_domain_bonus_rationale: All five survivors bridge stochastic thermodynamics / statistical physics → bacterial cell biology, spanning 2+ disciplinary boundaries (physics journals vs. microbiology journals, distinct training tracks, separate experimental communities)

hypotheses.title: DnaA-ATP Counting at oriC Is Near-Optimal for the Bacterial Adder

score_justifications.novelty: Critic confirmed zero prior papers connecting TUR to adder model or DnaA-ATP counting via 6 independent web searches. 2025 bioRxiv TUR-cell-signaling preprint confirmed non-prior-art. Cleanest DISJOINT in the session.
score_justifications.mechanistic_specificity: Names TUR formalism (Barato & Seifert 2015), DnaA-ATP at oriC (N=11 boxes, corrected), RIDA via Hda+beta-clamp, deltaG_ATP=20 kBT, CV floor>=9.5%, E. coli at ~1.05-1.37x floor. Gaps: Markov assumption undemonstrated, noise decomposition (counting vs extrinsic) empirically open.
score_justifications.cross_field_distance: Stochastic thermodynamics (statistical mechanics, physics) to bacterial molecular biology (microbiology). Separate journals, training tracks, conferences. Genuine cross-disciplinary bridge.
score_justifications.testability: CV floor (>=9.5%) testable against existing published mother-machine datasets immediately. PhD student can analyze Taheri-Araghi 2015 data within weeks; generate new DnaA-YPet fluorescence + mother-machine data in 3-6 months.
score_justifications.impact: First thermodynamic bound on cell size homeostasis precision. Near-optimality claim would reframe evolutionary selection on DnaA counting. Would not open new field but substantially reframes adder literature.
score_justifications.groundedness: TUR formalism verified, CV_added verified (Taheri-Araghi 2015), deltaG_ATP verified. DnaA box count had one error (20 to 11, corrected - correction strengthens claim). STRING DnaA-Hda plausible. ~70% grounded per Critic.

hypotheses.title: Multi-Fork Replication Creates Parallel Counting Currents with Correlated Noise

score_justifications.novelty: 2023 PRX Life paper already analyzes shared DnaA pool and correlated initiation noise in multi-origin E. coli. TUR multi-current quantification is new but the biological phenomenon is prior art. 2025 Nature Communications on DnaA titration also adjacent.
score_justifications.mechanistic_specificity: Multi-fork replication (Cooper & Helmstetter 1968) and synchronous initiation (2023 PRX Life: ~68% synchronous within 5 min) verified. Clear discriminating prediction: DnaA overexpression reduces CV only at fast growth (n>1 origins). Complication: DnaA membrane interactions (acidic phospholipids) not accounted for in shared-pool model.
score_justifications.cross_field_distance: Multi-current TUR (statistical physics) to bacterial multi-fork replication (microbiology). Same class as H1.
score_justifications.testability: DnaA overexpression at different growth rates is tractable. Fast-growth-specific response is discriminating. Mother-machine + DnaA overexpression across growth conditions feasible in 3 months.
score_justifications.impact: Would explain growth-rate-dependent correlation structure in initiation noise and thermodynamically quantify synchrony costs in multi-fork replication. Moderate impact - extends H1 framework.
score_justifications.groundedness: Multi-fork replication verified, synchronous initiation verified, DnaA shared pool concept established. One known oversimplification: DnaA has membrane affinity that modulates activity. ~65% grounded per Critic.

hypotheses.title: RIDA-Mediated ATP Hydrolysis as Landauer Erasure Counter-Reset

score_justifications.novelty: Critic confirmed no prior work connecting RIDA to Landauer erasure principle. Novel framing confirmed. Partially undercut by quantitative irrelevance (30x above Landauer bound), but the connection itself is unprecedented.
score_justifications.mechanistic_specificity: RIDA mechanism specific (Hda+beta-clamp, Kato & Katayama 2001). Asymmetric predictions (Hda loss: CV up; Hda excess: CV unchanged below floor). But Landauer bit is undefined - DnaA-ATP/ADP is continuous, not discrete. Erasure analogy is metaphorical not structurally rigorous.
score_justifications.cross_field_distance: Information theory / Landauer erasure (physics/information science) to bacterial molecular biology. Similar distance to H1.
score_justifications.testability: Hda loss to CV up is testable but Hda mutants have pleiotropic effects (SOS, overinitiation) that obscure signal. Predictions test RIDA biology but do not discriminate Landauer interpretation from simpler counter-reset explanations. Requires conditional CRISPRi for clean test.
score_justifications.impact: System operates 30x above Landauer minimum so erasure framing adds no quantitative constraint. Predictions already expected from RIDA biology without invoking information theory. Concept raises interesting question but cannot change understanding of why RIDA costs what it does.
score_justifications.groundedness: RIDA mechanism grounded (Kato & Katayama 2001). Landauer principle grounded (Berut et al. 2012). Bridge between RIDA and Landauer erasure is pure speculation. ~50% grounded per Critic.

hypotheses.title: MinCDE Oscillation Dissipation Sets TUR Floor for Division Positioning

score_justifications.novelty: Two papers are direct prior art: Fei & Bhatt 2015 (PLOS Comput Biol) analyzed MinCDE free energy dissipation; Marsland 2019 applied TUR to biochemical oscillators. DnaA vs MinCDE comparison is new but both component analyses exist. Least novel hypothesis among survivors.
score_justifications.mechanistic_specificity: MinCDE oscillation (Raskin & de Boer 1999), MinD ATPase, period (40-120s) all verified. But quantitative prediction (Min at 15-25x TUR floor) is purely speculative with no measurement. Fei & Bhatt 2015 finding that excess dissipation HURTS Min precision contradicts simple TUR analysis - relationship is non-monotonic.
score_justifications.cross_field_distance: Periodic TUR (stochastic thermodynamics) to MinCDE spatial oscillation and division positioning (bacterial cell biology). Same distance class as other hypotheses.
score_justifications.testability: In vivo MinD ATPase ATP consumption measurement for the 15-25x TUR floor is technically very challenging. Critic explicitly flags 'weakly falsifiable.' Requires different TUR variants (steady-state vs periodic) complicating the DnaA comparison.
score_justifications.impact: Establishes thermodynamic efficiency hierarchy between DnaA counting (~1.05x floor) and MinCDE positioning (~15-25x floor). Descriptive rather than mechanistically explanatory. Lower impact than H1 since it adds to existing framing.
score_justifications.groundedness: MinCDE oscillation, MinD ATPase, period all verified. Quantitative prediction (15-25x TUR floor) speculative. DnaA comparison inherits corrected N=11. ~55% grounded per Critic.

hypotheses.promotion_rationale: H7 uses periodic TUR on MinCDE oscillation (division positioning), a mechanistically distinct bridge from H1/H3/H4 (DnaA counting TUR). Most dissimilar hypothesis in survivor set. Promoted to prevent DnaA-counting convergence in evolution.

hypotheses.title: Non-Monotonic DnaA Generates Precision Maximum at Intermediate Growth

score_justifications.novelty: No prior work combines non-monotonic DnaA with TUR analysis. Specific 0.7 dbl/hr prediction is novel. However, apparent novelty may be artifact of unverified (and potentially wrong) core claim. If non-monotonic DnaA claim is false, novelty collapses.
score_justifications.mechanistic_specificity: References Schmidt et al. 2016 and gives specific growth rate (0.7 dbl/hr). But core claim (non-monotonic DnaA per origin) is unverified - may misinterpret total DnaA vs per-origin DnaA. Compensation mechanisms (DARS, datA titration, DnaA-ATP/ADP ratio regulation) not accounted for. TUR floor varies only 7.1-8.5%, likely unresolvable.
score_justifications.cross_field_distance: Stochastic thermodynamics + quantitative proteomics to bacterial cell biology. Same class.
score_justifications.testability: DnaA-YPet tracking across growth rates is technically feasible but effect size (7.1-8.5% TUR floor variation) likely unresolvable against total CV (10-18%). Existing monotonic trend data may already falsify the non-monotonic peak prediction.
score_justifications.impact: If true, reveals non-trivial structure in size homeostasis noise landscape. Moderate impact within field. Not transformative.
score_justifications.groundedness: Core mechanistic claim (non-monotonic DnaA per origin) could not be verified. Critic flags HIGH HALLUCINATION RISK. Schmidt et al. 2016 exists but specific DnaA non-monotonicity unconfirmed. DnaA generally increases with growth rate (Bremer & Dennis 1996). ~35% grounded per Critic.

hypotheses.demotion_rationale: H1, H3, H4 all share DnaA-counting TUR bridge (same mechanism, same subfields, related prediction type) - 3 of 5 top hypotheses convergent. H3 is the lowest-scoring DnaA-TUR hypothesis with lowest groundedness (35%) and unverified core claim. Demoted from evolution selection. If Schmidt et al. 2016 non-monotonic DnaA claim is confirmed in future cycle, H3 should be reconsidered.
hypotheses.revival_condition: Confirmation of non-monotonic DnaA copy number per origin from Schmidt et al. 2016 or independent proteomics source

diversity_check.similarity_basis: All three use DnaA-ATP accumulation at oriC as the TUR-bounded molecular current. Same bridge mechanism, same disciplinary pairing (stochastic thermodynamics x bacterial cell biology), related prediction types (CV floors and growth-rate dependencies).
diversity_check.action: Keep H1 (highest-scoring, sole SURVIVES). Keep H4 (higher of H3/H4; more distinct prediction: multi-fork regime, correlated noise from shared pool). Demote H3 (lowest-scoring DnaA-TUR; unverified core claim; unresolvable effect size). Promote H7 (most dissimilar: periodic TUR on MinCDE oscillation, different biological sub-system - division positioning vs. size measurement).
diversity_check.linear_rank_change: H7 moves from rank 5 to evolution selection rank 4; H3 moves from rank 4 to non-selected rank 5

results.H1_vs_H2: H1 - Sharp 9.5% floor vs. uninformative Landauer framing 30x above bound
results.H1_vs_H3: H1 - Verified foundation vs. unverified non-monotonic DnaA core claim
results.H1_vs_H4: H1 - Near-optimality claim more impactful, confirmed zero-hit gap vs. partial prior art in PRX Life 2023
results.H1_vs_H7: H1 - H7 partially anticipated by Fei & Bhatt 2015 and Marsland 2019; H1 is cleanest DISJOINT
results.H2_vs_H3: H2 - RIDA biochemistry verified; H3 core claim unverified and high hallucination risk
results.H2_vs_H4: H4 - Growth-regime-specific prediction more testable; biology fully verified; Landauer framing non-discriminating
results.H2_vs_H7: H2 - Asymmetric Hda prediction more feasible than in vivo MinD ATP consumption measurement
results.H3_vs_H4: H4 - Biology fully verified; H3 core claim unverified with potentially wrong premise
results.H3_vs_H7: H7 - MinCDE biology verified; H3 unverified core claim and unresolvable effect size
results.H4_vs_H7: H4 - Growth-regime-specific prediction clear and discriminating; H7 weakly falsifiable per Critic

elo_tournament.verdict: Elo confirms linear ranking — top 3 identical in both (H1, H4, H2)
elo_tournament.divergence_note: H7 and H3 swap at positions 4-5. Linear composite puts H3 (5.5) above H7 (5.2) due to higher Novelty (7 vs 4). Elo reverses this because pairwise 'which would you test first?' penalizes H3's unverified core claim more heavily than the Novelty dimension does. Diagnostic signal: H3's Novelty score (7) is potentially inflated by an unverified mechanistic claim. If non-monotonic DnaA per origin is false, H3's effective composite drops to ~4.0. Evolver note: any evolution of H3 must first anchor the Schmidt et al. 2016 non-monotonicity claim.

selection_rationale.H1: Primary target. Sole SURVIVES verdict. Composite 8.3. Confirmed DISJOINT. Sharp falsifiable floor prediction testable against existing datasets.
selection_rationale.H4: Extends H1 to multi-fork regime with distinct correlation-structure prediction. Well-grounded biology. Evolution should resolve DnaA membrane interaction complication and acknowledge 2023 PRX Life prior art explicitly.
selection_rationale.H2: Novel information-theoretic framing with grounded RIDA biology. Evolution should either find a prediction discriminating Landauer vs. simpler RIDA explanations, or reframe without requiring operation near Landauer bound.
selection_rationale.H7: Diversity-promoted. Most mechanistically dissimilar (MinCDE periodic TUR vs DnaA counting TUR). Evolution should quantify 15-25x TUR floor using Fei & Bhatt 2015 data, resolve non-monotonic dissipation-precision finding, and sharpen experimental test.
